Kyckr is a business registry data aggregator with global coverage. The platform sources directly from official company registries in over a hundred jurisdictions, exposing corporate structure, beneficial ownership, and KYB data through a single API. Core use cases are due diligence, onboarding, UBO discovery, and KYB workflows that feed AML programs.

The customer base is enterprise — banks, corporate service providers, law firms, and compliance teams that want authoritative registry data rather than scraped or inferred data. Pricing is custom, typically per query or per report.
